source_rationale: CD3E is a core T cell receptor complex component, marking this cluster as T cells
CD8A marks cytotoxic T lymphocytes, indicating a CD8+ T cell identity
KLRB1 (CD161) is expressed on NK/T cells and marks activated or innate-like T cells
Granzyme B is a cytotoxic effector molecule characteristic of activated cytotoxic T/NK cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is highly expressed by effector/memory T cells and NK cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed in NK and cytotoxic T cells
CD69 is an early activation marker on T cells indicating tissue-resident or recently activated status
Interferon-gamma is a hallmark cytokine of activated Th1 and cytotoxic T cells
KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an NK receptor expressed on NK cells and some CD8+ T cells
IL7R (CD127) marks memory T cells and is characteristic of tissue-resident T lymphocytes
Alpha-crystallin A is a lens-specific protein marking lens epithelial/fiber cells
Beta-crystallin B2 is a major structural protein of the ocular lens
PROX1 is a transcription factor essential for lens fiber cell differentiation
FOXE3 is a transcription factor critical for lens epithelial cell development
GJA8 (connexin 50) is a gap junction protein specific to lens fiber cells
PAX6 is a master regulator of eye development expressed in lens epithelium
HES5 is a Notch target gene involved in lens progenitor maintenance
ECM1 is an extracellular matrix glycoprotein highly expressed in anterior lens epithelium
Gamma-crystallin S is a lens-specific structural protein
CD74 (invariant chain) is highly expressed on antigen-presenting B cells
MS4A1 (CD20) is a definitive B cell surface marker
CD79A is a B cell receptor signaling component and canonical B cell marker
CD79B is part of the BCR signaling complex specific to B lymphocytes
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II gene highly expressed on B cells for antigen presentation
BANK1 is a B cell-specific scaffold protein involved in BCR signaling
BLK is a Src family kinase specifically expressed in B lymphocytes
IRF8 is a transcription factor important for B cell differentiation and function
Immunoglobulin J chain is expressed by antibody-secreting B cells/plasmablasts
VPREB3 is a pre-B cell receptor component marking B cell lineage
Keratin 3 is a cornea-specific cytokeratin marking corneal epithelial cells
Keratin 12 is specifically expressed in corneal epithelium
Keratin 5 marks basal epithelial cells including corneal/limbal epithelium

Desmoplakin is a desmosomal component marking epithelial cells with strong cell-cell adhesion

MAL is a lipid raft protein highly expressed in differentiated corneal epithelium

Inward rectifier potassium channel marking specific retinal neuron types
